## Checklist

- [ ] My commits follow the [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) style
- [ ] I tested the extension manually via `about:debugging`
- [ ] I ran `web-ext lint` with no errors (if applicable)
- [ ] I did not add any new `manifest.json` permission (or I documented why one was needed)
- [ ] I updated the documentation (README / CONTRIBUTING) if needed
- [ ] I added an entry to `CHANGELOG.md` under "Unreleased"
